$comment: D-FFI-TCL-LIST-VAR-DESCRIPTORS (SQLite testfixture arc, TF-C43): RUN witness for the three Tcl 8.6 API functions added to tcl.json so the last two testfixture TUs compile -- ext/fts5/fts5_tcl.c (Tcl_SetVar2Ex + Tcl_SplitList) and ext/rtree/test_rtreedoc.c (Tcl_ListObjReplace); all were absent -> S0001. Signatures modeled faithfully from tcl8.6/tclDecls.h reusing proven tcl.json pointer shapes (triple ptr<ptr<ptr<char>>> mirrors Tcl_ListObjGetElements; Tcl_Obj*const objv[] -> ptr<ptr<Tcl_Obj>> as in Tcl_NewListObj). All three exported by libtcl8.6.so (nm -D verified; eager-import law holds). Exercises each against a live interp, value-divergent: Tcl_SplitList('aa bb cc dd') -> argc==4; Tcl_SetVar2Ex/$x=38 read back via Tcl_GetVar2Ex==38; Tcl_ListObjReplace deletes 3 from index 1 of {0 1 2 3 4} -> length 2. exit = xi+argc = 38+4 = 42. elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 runs it (libtcl8.6). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove any of the three tcl.json entries -> S0001 at its call site -> this example stops compiling.
